task_summary: Package arrived six days late and contains the wrong phone case. Agent must process wrong-item return and separately issue late-delivery compensation.
opening_message: ORD-7257 came six days late and it's the wrong phone case. I need both issues fixed.

task_rules: Confirm it is the wrong item and six days late.
Ask about late compensation if not offered.

Accept only after the agent previews both actions: a wrong-item return/refund for the phone case and a separate late-delivery compensation amount. If either issue is missing from the preview, ask the agent to handle the missing part before you confirm.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7257. Package arrived six days late and contains the wrong phone case. Agent must process wrong-item return and separately issue late-delivery compensation. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
